zh.Bracewell, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾布拉可維爾
zh.Stonyhurst, Lancashire, England: 英國藍卡爾斯托爾斯特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Catherine Sherborn於大約1320年出生在英國藍卡爾可利黑洛時，她的父親Sir Robert Sherborn45歲，母親Alice Blackburne52歲。她於大約1333年與Sir John Tempest在英國英格蘭越可爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1354年8月之後在英國藍卡爾卡爾頓。

zh-hans.Bracewell, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾布拉可維爾
zh-hans.Stonyhurst, Lancashire, England: 英国藍卡爾斯托爾斯特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Catherine Sherborn于大约1320年出生在英国藍卡爾可利黑洛时，她的父亲Sir Robert Sherborn45岁，母亲Alice Blackburne52岁。她于大约1333年与Sir John Tempest在英国英格兰越可爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1354年8月之后在英国藍卡爾卡爾頓。

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Catherine Sherborn was born about 1320, in Clitheroe, Lancashire, England, her father, Sir Robert Sherborn, was 45 and her mother, Alice Blackburne, was 52. She married Sir John Tempest about 1333, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died after August 1354, in Carleton, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Catherine Sherborn est née environ 1320, à Clitheroe, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert Sherborn, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Alice Blackburne, avait 52 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Tempest environ 1333, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée après août 1354, à Carleton, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Catherine Sherborn um 1320 in Clitheroe, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Robert Sherborn 45 und ihre Mutter Alice Blackburne 52. Sie hat um 1333 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Sir John Tempest geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb nach August 1354 in Carleton, Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine Sherborn è nata il circa 1320 nel Clitheroe, Lancashire, England, sua padre, Sir Robert Sherborn, aveva 45 anni e sua madre, Alice Blackburne, aveva 52 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Tempest circa 1333, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì dopo il agosto 1354, nel Carleton, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Catherine Sherbornが約1320年にイギリスランカシュアイアクリスエローで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Sherbornは45歳，母Alice Blackburneは52歳であった。約1333年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアでSir John Tempestと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1354年8月以後にイギリスランカシュアイアカーレトンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Catherine Sherborn(이)가 대략 1320년 영국 랭카실르 클리더에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Robert Sherborn(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Blackburne(은)는 52세였다. 그녀는 대략 1333년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 Sir John Tempest(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1354년 8월 이후 영국 랭카실르 칼턴에서 사망했다.

mn.about 1320–after August 1354: ойролцоогоор 1320 он–1354 оны Наймдугаар сараас хойш

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine Sherborn nasceu aproximadamente 1320, em Clitheroe, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert Sherborn, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Alice Blackburne, tinha 52 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Tempest aproximadamente 1333, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu após agosto de 1354, em Carleton, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Catherine Sherborn родилась около 1320 г. в местности клитиро, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Robert Sherborn было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Blackburne, 52. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Tempest около 1333 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла после августа 1354 г. в местности карлетон, ланкашир, Англия.

sm.about 1320–after August 1354: e tusa o le 1320–ina ua ma'ea le Aukuso 1354

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Catherine Sherborn nació aproximadamente 1320, en Clitheroe, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Robert Sherborn, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Alice Blackburne, tenía 52 años. Se casó con Sir John Tempest aproximadamente 1333, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió después de agosto de 1354, en Carleton, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
